steps.title: Explain the missing lightning evidence
steps.content: Some scientists connect Venusian whistler waves to lightning because their energy signatures resemble Earth's. Other scientists point out that PVO and VEX found little evidence of other lightning-related phenomena, such as flashes of light.

steps.title: Choose an alternate cause
steps.content: Choice B denies that the waves are whistler waves, but the passage treats them as such. Choice C says Venusian lightning is unlikely to generate whistler waves, which does not explain the recorded waves. Choice D blames imprecise data, but the passage emphasizes missing lightning evidence. The answer is A.
